title: Keep Growing
description: Continue doing activities that make you happy and maintain a healthy routine.

title: Share Positivity
description: Spend time with family and friends.

title: Talk to Someone
description: Share your feelings with a trusted friend, family member, teacher, or counselor.

title: Take a Walk
description: Spend 15 minutes outside and enjoy fresh air.

title: Study Planner
description: Break your work into smaller achievable tasks.

title: Grounding Exercise
description: Focus on five things you can see, four you can touch, three you can hear, two you can smell, and one you can taste.

title: Relaxation
description: Take a short break and avoid overthinking.

title: Exercise
description: Go for a short walk or do light exercise.

title: Connect with Someone
description: Call or message a trusted friend or family member.

title: Join Activities
description: Participate in a club, community, or study group.

title: Make a List
description: Write down your thoughts and prioritize one task at a time.

title: Keep Going
description: Stay consistent and celebrate small achievements.

title: Healthy Routine
description: Maintain good sleep, nutrition, and regular exercise.
